2604.07530.title: The Shrinking Lifespan of LLMs in Science
2604.07530.paper_summary: Scaling laws describe how language model capabilities grow with compute and data, but say nothing about how long a model matters once released. We provide the first large-scale empirical account of how scientists adopt and abandon language models over time. We track 62 LLMs across over 108k citing papers (2018-2025), each with at least three years of post-release data, and classify every citation as active adoption or background reference to construct per-model adoption trajectories that raw citation counts cannot resolve. We find three regularities. First, scientific adoption follows an inverted-U trajectory: usage rises after release, peaks, and declines as newer models appear, a pattern we term the \textit{scientific adoption curve}. Second, this curve is compressing: each additional release year is associated with a 27\% reduction in time-to-peak adoption ($p < 0.001$), robust to minimum-age thresholds and controls for model size. Third, release timing dominates model-level attributes as a predictor of lifecycle dynamics. Release year explains both time-to-peak and scientific lifespan more strongly than architecture, openness, or scale, though model size and access modality retain modest predictive power for total adoption volume. Together, these findings complement scaling laws with adoption-side regularities and suggest that the forces driving rapid capability progress may be the same forces compressing scientific relevance.
2604.07530.paper_summary_zh: 擴展法則描述了語言模型能力如何隨著計算和數據的增長而增長，但並未說明模型發布後的持續重要性。我們提供了首個大規模實證研究，探討科學家如何隨著時間的推移採用和放棄語言模型。我們追蹤了62個大型語言模型（LLMs），涵蓋超過108,000篇引用論文（2018-2025），每個模型至少有三年的發布後數據，並將每個引用分類為主動採用或背景參考，以構建每個模型的採用軌跡，這是原始引用計數無法解決的。我們發現了三個規律。首先，科學採用遵循一個倒U形軌跡：使用在發布後上升，達到高峰，然後隨著新模型的出現而下降，這一模式我們稱之為\textit{科學採用曲線}。其次，這條曲線正在壓縮：每增加一年的發布，與達到高峰採用的時間相關的時間減少27\%（$p < 0.001$），這一結果對於最小年齡閾值和模型大小的控制是穩健的。第三，發布時機在預測生命週期動態方面主導模型層級屬性。發布年份對於達到高峰的時間和科學壽命的解釋力比架構、開放性或規模更強，儘管模型大小和接入方式對於總採用量仍保留適度的預測能力。總體而言，這些發現補充了擴展法則，提供了採用方面的規律，並暗示推動快速能力進步的力量可能是壓縮科學相關性的相同力量。
2604.07530.author: Ana Trišović et.al.
